trivia_bullets.text: Kitesail Scout is a common Creature — Kor Scout for {W} from Battle for Zendikar (BFZ, October 2015). The kor are Zendikar's nomadic cliff-dwelling people who use rope and sail technology (kitesails, hooklines, line-slinging) to traverse the plane's dramatic terrain of floating hedrons and sheer canyon walls. Note: Kitesail Scout lacks the Ally subtype, unlike Kor Castigator and Cliffside Lookout from the same set.

"The wind in one's hair, the sun on one's back, the joy of open skies . . . the next generation of kor must know this kind of peace." The flavor text frames a wartime scout as carrying a peace-memory — the preservation of what flight means to the kor, passed to future generations, is a stewardship act performed in the middle of catastrophic Eldrazi invasion.

A 1/1 flier for {W}; pauper- and commander-legal. EDHREC rank 23,294 reflects negligible constructed presence. The one-mana 1/1 flier is a consistent Limited role-player and an Ally-tribal enabler (non-Ally creatures entering as Ally-adjacent value).

Thematic connection to Akiri, the legendary kor line-slinger whose flavor-text narrates Kor Castigator in the same set: Akiri is canonically one of Zendikar's greatest kitesail and rope practitioners. Kitesail Scout's art depicts exactly the discipline Akiri represents — aerial canyon reconnaissance via kite-frame sail technology. No direct flavor linkage; thematic adjacency only.
